'''鈭歴-m-b-j''' ('''kasambejoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:twynne|twynne]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-m-b-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:twynne|twynne]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歴-m-b-j
|-
! Lemma
| kasambejoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisambejoko|thisambejoko]] || [[word:jisambejoko|jisambejoko]] || [[word:shisambejoko|shisambejoko]] || [[word:kisambejoko|kisambejoko]]
|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
